title: VRF + GRE: Finance VRF'i Tunnel 10 ile R11-R22 Arasında Uzat, VRF Static Routing
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: A colleague started configuring a new network. All configurations on R22 are complete and communication between R11 and R22 is functional. Complete the configurations on R11 for the tasks below.
Task 1: Extend the Finance VRF between R11 and R22 using Tunnel 10.
Task 2: Complete the Finance VRF configuration on R11 and configure static routing so that traffic between VLAN 111 and VLAN 222 uses Tunnel 10 exclusively.
Note: Sw11 can be used to validate traffic flow.
hints: VRF'i once interface'e ata ('vrf forwarding Finance' / eski sozdizimi 'ip vrf forwarding'), SONRA IP adresini yaz — VRF atamasi mevcut IP'yi siler.
Tunnel kaynak/hedefi GLOBAL tablodadir: source e0/0, destination R22'nin ISP yuzu 209.165.201.6.
VLAN 222'ye giden trafik Tunnel'i kullansin diye next-hop tunelin karsi ucu: 10.10.100.2. VLAN 111 icin next-hop Sw11: 10.11.11.2.
answer_key_raw:
R11:
R11> enable
R11# configure terminal
R11(config)# interface Ethernet0/1
R11(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding Finance
R11(config-if)# ip address 10.11.11.1 255.255.255.252
R11(config-if)# no shutdown
R11(config-if)# exit
R11(config)# interface Tunnel10
R11(config-if)# ip vrf forwarding Finance
R11(config-if)# ip address 10.10.100.1 255.255.255.252
R11(config-if)# tunnel source Ethernet0/0
R11(config-if)# tunnel destination 209.165.201.6
R11(config-if)# no shutdown
R11(config-if)# exit
R11(config)# ip route vrf Finance 10.10.111.0 255.255.255.0 10.11.11.2
R11(config)# ip route vrf Finance 10.10.222.0 255.255.255.0 10.10.100.2
R11(config)# end
R11# write
explanation: Tunnel10, VRF Finance icine alinir (vrf forwarding) ve 10.10.100.1/30 IP'si verilir; tunel dis (global) adresler uzerinden kurulur: source e0/0, destination 209.165.201.6. e0/1 de ayni VRF'e alinip 10.11.11.1/30 verilir. VRF icin statik rotalar 'ip route vrf Finance ...' ile yazilir: VLAN111 agi Sw11 uzerinden (10.11.11.2), VLAN222 agi tunelin karsi ucu uzerinden (10.10.100.2) — boylece VLAN'lar arasi trafik yalnizca Tunnel 10'u kullanir.
